scripts.typecheck: for pkg in packages/bun-helpers packages/claude-integration packages/cli packages/data packages/docker-integration packages/evals packages/execution packages/web; do (cd $pkg && bunx tsc --noEmit) || exit 1; done
scripts.ci-checks: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run test:integration && bun audit --audit-level=moderate
